ext.description: Lightweight image editor for PNG/JPG/WEBP/GIF/BMP — chroma-key background removal, color eyedropper, and crop. Right-click any image to open. Output is always PNG, saved alongside the source as <name>-<YYMMDDHHMMSS>.png.

runtime.Hover the image to sample, click to copy: Hover the image to sample, click to copy hex.
runtime.Drag a rectangle on the image. Esc to cl: Drag a rectangle on the image. Esc to clear.
